capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an automation, orchestration, and integration service for security operations?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an automation and orchestration service exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise automation and orchestration service exists

questions.prompt: Is the automation and orchestration service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the service is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular automation service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise use a SOAR or equivalent security orchestration platform to coordinate workflows across security tools?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a SOAR or orchestration platform is adopted
questions.evaluation_focus: SOAR or equivalent orchestration platform adoption

questions.prompt: Is security orchestration deployed enterprise-wide rather than limited to a single team or tool silo?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether orchestration coverage is enterprise-wide
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide orchestration coverage

questions.prompt: Can the orchestration platform coordinate multi-step workflows across detection, enrichment, ticketing, and response tools?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether cross-tool workflow coordination is supported
questions.evaluation_focus: Cross-tool workflow coordination

questions.prompt: Is the SOAR or orchestration platform configuration reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether platform configuration is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular SOAR platform configuration review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise maintain documented security playbooks for common incident and remediation scenarios?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether documented security playbooks exist
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented security playbooks for common scenarios

questions.prompt: Are security playbooks version-controlled and subject to change management when updated?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether playbooks use version control and change management
questions.evaluation_focus: Playbook version control and change management

questions.prompt: Are security playbooks tested regularly through tabletop exercises or simulation runs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether playbooks are tested regularly
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular playbook testing and tabletop exercises

questions.prompt: Are security playbooks reviewed at least quarterly for accuracy and coverage gaps?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether playbooks are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular playbook accuracy and coverage review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise execute automated containment or remediation workflows from approved playbooks?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether automated containment and remediation workflows exist
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated containment and remediation workflows

questions.prompt: Do high-risk automated actions require human-in-the-loop approval before execution?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether human approval gates protect high-risk automated actions
questions.evaluation_focus: Human-in-the-loop approval for high-risk actions

questions.prompt: Are automated workflows integrated with ticketing and incident management systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether workflows integrate with ticketing and incident management
questions.evaluation_focus: Workflow integration with ticketing and incident management

questions.prompt: Are automated remediation workflows reviewed at least quarterly for effectiveness and false-positive rates?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether automated workflows are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular automated workflow effectiveness review

capability_questions.capability_name: Cross-platform integration and vendor lock-in risk

questions.prompt: Does security automation integrate across endpoint, cloud, identity, and network security platforms?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether cross-platform security tool integration exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Cross-platform security tool integration

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise depend on a specific vendor for a majority of endpoints, devices, or security applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether vendor dependency is assessed across the environment
questions.evaluation_focus: Vendor dependency assessment across endpoints, devices, and applications

questions.prompt: If vendor lock-in exists, does the enterprise evaluate it and either justify it or explore options to avoid full dependency?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether vendor lock-in is evaluated and mitigated
questions.evaluation_focus: Evaluation and justification or mitigation of vendor lock-in

questions.prompt: Does the organization maintain governance policies for AI use in security automation and playbook execution?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI use in security automation is governed
questions.evaluation_focus: Governance for AI use in security automation workflows

questions.prompt: Do analysts review and approve AI-recommended playbook actions before high-impact automated responses execute?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether analysts oversee AI-recommended automation actions
questions.evaluation_focus: Analyst oversight of AI-recommended playbook actions

questions.prompt: Are AI-driven automated responses and remediations reviewed at least quarterly for accuracy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI-driven automation accuracy is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular review of AI-driven automation accuracy
